description:
Service group file model with schema version validation.

Example file:
```json
{
    "schema": "service_group_v1",
    "name": "my-llm-services",
    "display_name": "My LLM Services",
    "description": "LLM services for targeted promotions",
    "membership_rules": {
        "expression": "service_type == 'llm'"
    },
    "status": "private"
}
```

membership_rules.description:
Rules for automatic service membership. Format: {"expression": "<python_expression>"}
Available variables: service_id, seller_id, provider_id, seller_name, provider_name, name, display_name, service_type, status, listing_type, tags, is_featured
membership_rules.title: Membership Rules

parent_group_name.description: Parent group name for hierarchy (resolved to ancestor_path)
parent_group_name.title: Parent Group Name

title: ServiceGroupV1
